title: Plain PvP (1.8)
description:
A minimal PvP resource pack. 1.8.
(support for version 1.20.4 dropped)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lTzWz5dVh1Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
A minimal PvP resource pack that keeps the original textures of Minecraft.

The pack features:
- Mini Swords
- Mini Tools
- Mini Bow
- Bow Indicator
- Small Fire
- Transparent GUI
- Block breaking indicator
